div.p: The Security Council discussed the question of the governorship of the Free Territory of Trieste at its 233rd and 265th meetings which were held respectively on January 23 and March 9, 1948. For the record of these discussions see United Nations, Official Records of the Security Council, Third Year, Numbers 1–15, 233rd meeting, pages 204–207, and ibid., Numbers 36–51, 265th meeting, pages 65–66.
